CREATE TABLE test_numbers (x INT, y INT);
SELECT add(x, y) AS result FROM test_numbers;
SELECT add(COALESCE(x, 0), COALESCE(y, 0)) AS result FROM test_numbers;
SELECT add((SELECT SUM(x) FROM test_numbers), (SELECT COUNT(y) FROM test_numbers)) AS result;
SELECT add(a, b) AS combined FROM numbers1 CROSS JOIN numbers2;
SELECT add((SELECT MAX(x) FROM test_numbers), (SELECT MIN(y) FROM test_numbers)) AS extreme_sum;
SELECT add(x, (SELECT SUM(y) FROM test_numbers WHERE y > 0)) AS conditional_sum FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (val1 SMALLINT, val2 SMALLINT);
SELECT add(val1, val2) AS edge_case_result FROM edge_cases;
